options.text: We don't pay for weekends—that's just part of the job.
It's either paid at 1.5x rate or you can take equivalent time off later.
I'm not sure, ask your manager.
Weekend work is optional, so no compensation is needed.

content.explanation: 正确答案准确描述了加班补偿的两种常见形式（加班费或调休），语言专业且完整。选项1和4态度消极且不符合劳动政策规范；选项3推卸责任，不符合积极沟通的职场礼仪。
content.speakerText: Could you clarify how the company handles compensation for weekend work?
content.speakerTextCn: 您能说明一下公司如何处理周末工作的补偿吗？

options.text: Maybe—if you remind HR next week.
Yes, absolutely. It will be processed as overtime pay.
You should have asked before staying late.
We only compensate if it's approved in advance.

content.explanation: 正确答案明确、肯定且礼貌地确认了补偿，符合职场沟通原则。选项1模糊且推脱责任；选项3指责对方，语气不当；选项4虽可能是事实，但未直接回应补偿请求，缺乏建设性。
content.speakerText: I worked late last night. Will that be compensated as overtime?
content.speakerTextCn: 我昨晚加班了，这会算作加班补偿吗？

content.scenarioHint: 员工刚完成周末加班，想礼貌地向人事专员确认补偿方式是加班费还是调休

options.text: Just to confirm, will my weekend overtime be compensated with pay or time off?
Can I get extra money for working on Saturday?
Do you think I should take time off instead of getting paid?
When will I get my overtime pay?

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了专业礼貌的表达 'Just to confirm'，并清晰询问补偿方式（pay or time off），符合职场沟通规范。干扰项2过于直接，缺乏礼貌；干扰项3把问题变成建议，偏离了确认政策的意图；干扰项4假设了补偿方式一定是加班费，预设了错误前提。
